languages.text: {n}Искры бурлят вокруг Эоганна.{/n} "Быть может итог предопределила моя гордыня, но источник зла — ты, гнусный ксенос. Ты и весь твой вид. И ты разделишь вину со мной, хочешь ты того или нет".

{n}Sparks surge around Eogunn.{/n} "Perhaps it was my pride that decided the outcome, but you are the source of this evil, foul xenos. You, and your entire kind. And you will share the blame with me, whether you wish it or not."
languages.original_text: {n}Искры бурлят вокруг Эоганна.{/n} "Быть может итог предопределила моя гордыня, но источник зла — ты, гнусный ксенос. Ты и весь твой вид. И ты разделишь вину со мной, хочешь ты того или нет".

traits.locale_text: {n}Sparks surge around Eogunn.{/n} "Perhaps it was my pride that sealed the outcome, but you are the source of this evil, foul xenos. You, and your entire kind. And you will share the blame with me, whether you wish it or not."

"An odious falsehood designed to sully my good name!" {n}The Manipulus makes a point of turning away from Necron, hiding his gaze. {/n} "It is laughable to think my companions would believe such an... obvious lie."

"An odious falsehood designed to sully my good name!" {n}The Manipulus makes a point of turning away from Necron, hiding his gaze. {/n} "It is laughable to think my companions would believe such an... obvious lie."

{n}Sparks surge around Eogunn.{/n} "Perhaps it was my pride that sealed the outcome, but you are the source of this evil, foul xenos. You, and your entire kind. And you will share the blame with me, whether you wish it or not."

{n}Sparks surge around Eogunn.{/n} "Perhaps it was my pride that decided the outcome, but you are the source of this evil, foul xenos. You, and your entire kind. And you will share the blame with me, whether you wish it or not."

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡周身迸发出火花。{/n}“也许是我的傲慢导致了这一切，但你才是这罪恶的根源，肮脏的异形。你，还有你的整个种族。不管你愿不愿意，你都得跟我一起承担这份罪责。”
languages.original_text: {n}Sparks surge around Eogunn.{/n} "Perhaps it was my pride that decided the outcome, but you are the source of this evil, foul xenos. You, and your entire kind. And you will share the blame with me, whether you wish it or not."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡周身迸发出火花。{/n}“也许是我的傲慢导致了这一切，但你才是这罪恶的根源，肮脏的异形。你，还有你的整个种族。不管你愿不愿意，你都得跟我一起承担这份罪责。”

languages.text: {n}El aire en torno a Eogunn se llena de chispas.{/n} «Tal vez fuera mi orgullo el que decidió el resultado, pero tú eres la fuente de este mal, xenos miserable. Tú y toda tu especie. Y compartirás conmigo la culpa, quieras o no».
languages.original_text: {n}Sparks surge around Eogunn.{/n} "Perhaps it was my pride that decided the outcome, but you are the source of this evil, foul xenos. You, and your entire kind. And you will share the blame with me, whether you wish it or not."

traits.locale_text: {n}El aire en torno a Eogunn se llena de chispas.{/n} «Tal vez fuera mi orgullo el que decidió el resultado, pero tú eres la fuente de este mal, xenos miserable. Tú y toda tu especie. Y compartirás conmigo la culpa, quieras o no».

languages.text: {n}Des étincelles jaillissent autour d'Eogunn.{/n} « Peut-être que cette situation est la conséquence de ma fierté, mais vous restez à l'origine de ce mal, misérable xénos. Vous, ainsi que toute votre espèce. Et vous en subirez le châtiment à mes côtés, que cela vous plaise ou non. »
languages.original_text: {n}Sparks surge around Eogunn.{/n} "Perhaps it was my pride that decided the outcome, but you are the source of this evil, foul xenos. You, and your entire kind. And you will share the blame with me, whether you wish it or not."

traits.locale_text: {n}Des étincelles jaillissent autour d'Eogunn.{/n} « Peut-être que cette situation est la conséquence de ma fierté, mais vous restez à l'origine de ce mal, misérable xénos. Vous, ainsi que toute votre espèce. Et vous en subirez le châtiment à mes côtés, que cela vous plaise ou non. »

languages.text: {n}Kıvılcımlar, Eogunn'un etrafını sarıyor.{/n} "Belki de işi bu noktaya getiren benim gururum olabilir bu kötülüğün kaynağı sensin iğrenç zeno. Sen ve türün. İstesen de istemesen de suçu paylaşacağız."
languages.original_text: {n}Sparks surge around Eogunn.{/n} "Perhaps it was my pride that decided the outcome, but you are the source of this evil, foul xenos. You, and your entire kind. And you will share the blame with me, whether you wish it or not."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kıvılcımlar, Eogunn'un etrafını sarıyor.{/n} "Belki de işi bu noktaya getiren benim gururum olabilir bu kötülüğün kaynağı sensin iğrenç zeno. Sen ve türün. İstesen de istemesen de suçu paylaşacağız."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn wird in Funken gehüllt.{/n} "Vielleicht hat mein Stolz dieses Ergebnis bedingt, aber Ihr seid der Ursprung dieses Übels, verdammter Xenos. Ihr und Eure ganze Art. Die Schuld liegt also auch bei Euch, ob es Euch passt oder nicht."
languages.original_text: {n}Sparks surge around Eogunn.{/n} "Perhaps it was my pride that decided the outcome, but you are the source of this evil, foul xenos. You, and your entire kind. And you will share the blame with me, whether you wish it or not."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn wird in Funken gehüllt.{/n} "Vielleicht hat mein Stolz dieses Ergebnis bedingt, aber Ihr seid der Ursprung dieses Übels, verdammter Xenos. Ihr und Eure ganze Art. Die Schuld liegt also auch bei Euch, ob es Euch passt oder nicht."

languages.text: 「私の名声を汚すために作られた、忌まわしい嘘だ！」{n}マニピュラスはネクロンの視線を避け、目をそらす。{/n}「私の仲間がそんな…明白な嘘を信じるなんて、笑える」
languages.original_text: "An odious falsehood designed to sully my good name!" {n}The Manipulus makes a point of turning away from Necron, hiding his gaze. {/n} "It is laughable to think my companions would believe such an... obvious lie."

traits.locale_text: 「私の名声を汚すために作られた、忌まわしい嘘だ！」{n}マニピュラスはネクロンの視線を避け、目をそらす。{n}「私の仲間がそんな…明白な嘘を信じるなんて、笑える」
